title: Video - 2024 Canadian Health Survey on Children and Youth (CHSCY)
content:
## Video - 2024 Canadian Health Survey on Children and Youth (CHSCY)
(A boy is revealed on screen with an unfolding paper effect. He sits on a charity in his room in front of his computer. The camera slowly zoom in towards his computer screen that shows a pixelated image)
When it comes to your health, we can all agree that a fragmented, incomplete picture simply isn't enough.
(The picture becomes more clear, revealing a office building in a park. The words "FOR YOU" appear on screen)
That's why the Canadian Health Survey on Children and Youth is here—For you!
(We zoom into the building)
Allowing your voice and experiences to be heard on topics like:
(We see a girl sitting with a doctor in and room. A heart appears on screen)
Finding a health care provider
(A father and young girl are holding hands, they stand inside a pharmacy. A question mark appears on screen)
Addressing health care needs and long term conditions
(A girl is seen sitting down in a therapy room. Line drawn faces appear on screen around the girl)
Understanding your mental health.
(The scenes playback in reverse as we zoom out of the building)
To see the big picture, we need all pieces.
(The text "If selected for this survey, please participate! Canadian Health Survey on Children and Youth" appears on screen )
